allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\build_debug.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\diagnose.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\test.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack_dbg.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack_init.log'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Temp files cleaned up''")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Cleaned''")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "d:\TimeTrack\build.ps1")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Process ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 2; $p = Get-Process TimeTrack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { Write-Host ''RUNNING - SUCCESS!''; Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force } else { Write-Host ''FAILED to start'' }")
Bash(cmd /c "start /b d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe & timeout /t 2 /nobreak >nul & tasklist /fi "IMAGENAME eq TimeTrack.exe" 2>&1 & taskkill /f /im TimeTrack.exe >nul 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "d:\TimeTrack\_verify.ps1")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\_verify.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Done''")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\test.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Cleaned for test''")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File "d:\TimeTrack\test_scenarios.ps1")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\test_scenarios.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Test files cleaned''")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; $proc = Start-Process ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; $p = Get-Process -Name TimeTrack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { Write-Host ''OK: Process running, PID='' $p.Id; Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Host ''FAIL: Process not found'' }")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Remove-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\_verify.ps1'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Done''")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host ''Killed any running instances''")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$f = Get-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($f) { Write-Host (''SUCCESS: '' + $f.Name + '' '' + $f.Length + '' bytes '' + $f.LastWriteTime) } else { Write-Host ''FAILED: No exe produced'' }")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Write-Host ''Killed''")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$proc = Start-Process ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; $p = Get-Process -Name TimeTrack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { Write-Host ''OK: Process running, PID='' $p.Id; Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } else { Write-Host ''FAIL: Process not found'' }")

Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process ''d:\TimeTrack\TimeTrack.exe'' -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep 3; $p = Get-Process -Name TimeTrack -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($p) { Write-Host (''OK: PID='' + $p.Id); Stop-Process -Name TimeTrack -Force } else { Write-Host ''FAIL'' }")
Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-Item ''d:\TimeTrack\timetrack.ico'' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime")
